subcodes.title: Words spoken at 97 Cadogan Gardens, ca. Sep. 1911
subcodes.first_line: That is well. Very well. A day's work done in the spirit of service is in itself an act of worship. Such work is a prayer unto God.
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @work as worship, @courtesy; culture [adab]
